channel.title: AP News - US News
channel.description: Top US News stories from AP News

item.title: Dangerous conditions delay the recovery of 8 killed in California avalanche
item.description: Authorities in California say it will be at least another day before crews can attempt to recover the bodies of eight people killed in an avalanche and one other who remains missing.

item.title: Snow drought helped set the stage for deadly California avalanche, leading to unstable conditions
When Rhode Island shooter started firing, bystanders jumped into action to end the carnage
